title: Reading Group Guide
text: This Is How You Lose the Time War BY AMAL EL-MOHTAR & MAX GLADSTONE This reading group guide for This Is How You Lose the Time War includes an introduction, discussion questions, and ideas for enhancing your book club. The suggested questions are intended to help your reading group find new and interesting angles and topics for your discussion. We hope that these ideas will enrich your conversation and increase your enjoyment of the book.
